title: Luscious Velvet Malaysian Coconut Tart
description: A nutty, velvety low-carb dessert featuring lamination puff in scallop-shell vessels, highlighting Malaysian coconut flavor.
instructions: Prepare the scallop-shell shells by rinsing and patting dry; set aside.
In a bowl, whisk coconut flour, almond flour, shredded coconut, and stevia until evenly mixed.
Cut chilled butter into small cubes and add to dry mixture; use fingertips to blend into coarse crumbs.
Beat the egg and vanilla extract together, then pour into flour mixture, stirring until a firm dough forms.
Divide the dough into 8 equal portions and shape each into a small disc that will fit the shell cavities.
Gently press each disc into the base of a scallop shell, ensuring the dough fills the cavity.
Place the filled shells on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake at 180°C for 20 minutes, or until the crust turns golden and the filling looks set.
Allow to cool for 5 minutes, then carefully remove the shells from the baking sheet.
Serve warm, optionally dusting with extra shredded coconut for a velvety finish.
